v1.2.0.description:
## Localization Update & Minor Bug Fix

### Changes
- Refactored all player-facing text to use the localization system, laying the groundwork for full i18n support across the mod.
- Added support for every default BG3 language:
  - English
  - French
  - German
  - Spanish
  - Latin American Spanish
  - Polish
  - Russian
  - Italian
  - Turkish
  - Brazilian Portuguese
  - Japanese
  - Korean
  - Simplified Chinese
  - Traditional Chinese
  - Ukrainian

### Fixes
- Fixed an issue where summons and companions being downed or killed could incorrectly trigger DeathLink. **- zapony**
v1.2.0.title: v1.2.0 - Multilingual Milestone
